title: Visiting the Sick (Bikur Cholim): One of Judaism's Greatest Mitzvot
title_zh: 探访病人(Bikur Cholim):犹太教最伟大的诫命之一
title_he: ביקור חולים: אחת המצוות הגדולות ביהדות
description: When to visit, what to say, what not to say, bringing food, praying at the bedside, and the Talmud's teaching that visiting removes 1/60th of the illness.
key_sources: Nedarim 39b-40a - Laws of visiting the sick
Shabbat 127a - Reward in this world and the next
chinese_dynasty_equivalent: 汉朝至晋朝 (Han through Jin Dynasties)
author: Torah Light Project
